task_completion.description: The diagram contains three distinct visual zones for the organizations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three separate boxes, swimlanes, or clearly grouped areas labeled 'The White House', 'CREEP', and 'The Operatives'.

task_completion.description: All key actors from the dossier are included as nodes in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for individual nodes/shapes for Nixon, Haldeman, Mitchell, Liddy, McCord, Dean, Hunt, Magruder, and Ehrlichman.

task_completion.description: Actors are placed within their respective organizational zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the actor nodes being physically located inside the boundaries of the 'White House', 'CREEP', or 'Operatives' zones based on their roles.

task_completion.description: Connection lines between actors are present and labeled with the nature of the relationship.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 5 lines connecting the actor nodes. Every connection line must have text on or next to it describing the relationship (e.g., 'Reports to', 'Hired by', 'Managed cover-up').

task_completion.description: The diagram illustrates a flow of relationships from the burglars up to the President.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for directional arrows or a clear visual hierarchy (bottom-up, top-down, or left-to-right) showing connections originating from 'The Operatives', moving through 'CREEP' or White House staff, and ultimately leading to Nixon.

task_completion.description: Both the .drawio and .png files are saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file icons 'watergate_map.drawio' and 'watergate_map.png' on the Desktop background or listed in a file explorer viewing the Desktop directory.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the provided dossier.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'watergate_notes.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI diagramming application to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io/diagrams.net interface or a similar graphical diagramming tool being used in the screenshots, rather than just writing XML code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The exported PNG file is a genuine image of the created diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an image viewer or preview showing the actual diagram content for 'watergate_map.png', proving it is not a blank or corrupted file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must include exactly 3 organizational zones: 'The White House', 'CREEP', and 'The Operatives'. It must include 9 specific actors: Nixon, Haldeman, Mitchell, Liddy, McCord, Dean, Hunt, Magruder, and Ehrlichman. There must be at least 5 connection edges, and ALL edges must have text labels describing the relationship. Note: The relationships should reflect the provided 'watergate_notes.txt' dossier, even if they contain historical oversimplifications (e.g., Mitchell reporting to Haldeman, or Liddy hiring McCord).
